login.title: Sign In — SafraSense
login.description: Access SafraSense with CPF and phone.
login.subtitle: Your land, connected to the protection you already have a right to
login.freeRegistration: Free registration. No credit card required.
login.errorPhone: Please enter a valid phone number with area code.
login.consent: Ao entrar você concorda com os termos de uso e está ciente com as politicas de privacidade
login.consentError: You must accept the consent terms to proceed.
login.fullNamePlaceholder: Enter your full name or business name
login.errorIdentifier: Please enter a valid CPF or CNPJ.
login.errorFullName: Please enter your full name or business name.

onboarding.title: Ready, {name}. Your property is on the map.
onboarding.subtitle: See what is available on this platform
onboarding.path1_subtitle: See your land's conditions updated weekly: soil moisture and crop health.
onboarding.path2_subtitle: Pronaf, Garantia-Safra, Proagro Mais, PSR. We let you know if you qualify.
onboarding.path3_subtitle: If a severe climate event is confirmed by satellite, payment is released automatically, with no field inspection.
onboarding.footer: For now you're just monitoring. Other paths become available when needed.

dashboard.sub_alert: Your property has been below normal for 8 days
dashboard.sub_emergency: Severe stress confirmed for 3 consecutive weeks
dashboard.confidence_medium_desc: We will review before any action
dashboard.green_corn_text: If corn columns are green (Healthy): Vegetation shows optimal vigor. Continue with good land management!
dashboard.yellow_corn_text: If corn columns are yellow (Warning): Indicates early stress due to water shortage. Monitor soil moisture closely.
dashboard.red_corn_text: If corn columns are red/wilted (Severe drought): The satellite confirms severe drought and that plants suffer high stress. Seeking support from government programs or local cooperatives is highly recommended.
dashboard.parametric_card_sub: Direct payout via Pix in case of severe drought confirmed by satellite.
dashboard.recommendations_sub: Recommendations based on your land's stress level
dashboard.what_to_do_healthy_desc: Soil moisture is at ideal levels for second harvest corn crops. No emergency actions needed. Maintaining periodic monitoring is recommended.
dashboard.what_to_do_alert_desc: The NDVI index dropped slightly. We recommend evaluating supplementary irrigation if available and preparing insurance documentation in case of persistent lack of rain.
dashboard.what_to_do_emergency_desc: The satellite confirmed a critical moisture deficit for 3 consecutive weeks. Your cooperative has been notified to check the automatic payout trigger via Pix.
dashboard.what_to_do_forecast_desc: Rainfall within average, no severe climate warnings for Unaí, MG region in the next two weeks.
dashboard.emergency_card_desc_protected: Your property has been severely below normal for 21 days. We recommend researching possibilities for damage mitigation.
dashboard.emergency_card_desc_unprotected: Without active protection: we recommend immediate contact with your regional agronomist.
dashboard.alert_card_desc: Your property vegetative vigor has been below normal for 8 days. It could indicate water shortage, thermal stress, or nutritional issues. We recommend checking in person.
dashboard.healthy_card_desc: Nothing extraordinary. Maintain regular foliar fertilization calendar.
dashboard.forecast_card_desc: Rainfall within average. No climate warnings.

programs.title: Government programs — SafraSense
programs.header: We checked your eligibility based on {property}, {location} · {area} ha · corn (second harvest)
programs.subtitle: 3 programs you're entitled to. 1 that requires a different profile. We show you only what's true for you.
programs.disclaimer: SafraSense is not a government agency. We gather your data and guide you to Emater or the local rural union.
programs.pronaf_benefit: Up to R$ 250k/year in Pronaf Mais Alimentos · 3% p.a. for basic foods · 2.5% p.a. for investment
programs.pronaf_req1: Be a family farmer with active CAF (National Registry of Family Farming)
programs.pronaf_req2: Gross family income up to R$ 150k/year
programs.pronaf_req3: Comply with the Agricultural Climate Risk Zoning (ZARC)
programs.garantia_subtitle: Income guarantee for losses due to drought or excess rain
programs.garantia_benefit: R$ 1,200 in installments if there is loss of ≥50% in the municipality
programs.garantia_why_ineligible_area: ❌ Property area: 12 ha (the program requires between 0.6 and 5 ha)
programs.garantia_why_ineligible_location: ❌ Municipality: Unaí MG is in Northwest Minas Gerais (the program only serves semi-arid and North Minas Gerais)
programs.garantia_ineligible_exp: This program is designed for farmers with small properties in regions of severe climate risk. If your situation changes, we will let you know.
programs.garantia_ineligible_footer: We will notify you if the rules or your profile change.
programs.proagro_subtitle: Exemption from agricultural credit obligations in case of climate losses
programs.proagro_benefit: Covers up to R$ 200k of Pronaf financing in case of proven climate loss
programs.proagro_req1: Have active Pronaf financing (Custeio or Investment)
programs.proagro_req3: Comply with ZARC for the financed crop
programs.proagro_req4: Report loss to the financial institution in time
programs.proagro_exp: Proagro Mais is automatically contracted when you contract an eligible Pronaf. Its operation is managed by the Central Bank of Brazil.
programs.psr_subtitle: The Government pays part of the private crop insurance premium
programs.psr_benefit: 40% subsidy on premium for corn · 20% for soy
programs.psr_req1: Contract crop insurance with one of the 17 approved private insurers
programs.psr_req3: Comply with the Agricultural Climate Risk Zoning (ZARC)
programs.psr_exp: The PSR budget is released in stages during the year. Contracting must be done within the window of each crop.

profile.title: Profile
profile.drawerDesc: Create a new access password for your account.
profile.codeSentDesc: Confirmation code sent to WhatsApp at number {phone}.
profile.codeError: Invalid code. Enter the 4-digit code sent to your WhatsApp.
profile.successDesc: Your new password has been securely saved in the application database.
profile.deleteDataConfirm: Are you sure you want to delete all your data? This action is irreversible.
profile.deleteDataSuccess: All your data has been deleted. You will be logged out.

protection.title: Parametric Climate Insurance
protection.header: We checked parametric insurance options for Sítio Boa Esperança, Unaí MG · 12 ha
protection.subtitle: Automatic payout when the satellite detects a severe climate event
protection.benefit: No field inspection, no delay. Triggered by Copernicus satellite sensor.
protection.disclaimer: SafraSense brokers access. Coverage is operated by an authorized partner insurer.

cadastro.title: Property registration — SafraSense
cadastro.demarcate: Mark the area on the map and provide the address.
cadastro.tap_map: Tap to mark on the map
cadastro.first_harvest_desc: Main crop during regular rain periods (e.g., summer corn).
cadastro.second_harvest_desc: Second harvest: Short-cycle crop planted immediately after the main harvest.
cadastro.rotation_desc: Rotation: Alternating crops in the same area for soil protection and nutrition (e.g., corn rotated with soy).
cadastro.class_pequeno_desc: Eligible for Pronaf and Garantia-Safra (up to 4 fiscal modules).
cadastro.class_medio_desc: Eligible for Pronamp and federal crop insurance subsidy (PSR).
cadastro.class_grande_desc: Focus on federal PSR and customized large-scale parametric insurance.
cadastro.address_placeholder: E.g., BR-040 Highway, Km 12, Unaí-MG or Zip Code
cadastro.map_helper: Tap the image to draw your area polygon
cadastro.map_empty: Tap multiple points to outline your land plot

gatilho.sub: We detected severe drought for 3 consecutive weeks at Sítio Boa Esperança, Unaí MG.
gatilho.sent_pix: Payment made via Pix to your cooperative account.
gatilho.received_msg: R$ 4,000 indemnity deposited in your partner bank account.
gatilho.payout_desc: Your R$ 4,000 Pix will be credited within 4 hours.
gatilho.event_desc: Satellite monitoring detected 3 consecutive weeks with critical vegetative vigor. The contracted trigger was automatically activated — no field inspection, no bureaucracy.
gatilho.help_line: You will receive an SMS when the Pix is confirmed by the bank. In case of doubt, call (61) 3000-0000 — human support.

action.title: What to do now
action.subtitle: You have three options. They can be used together.
action.card1_desc: We keep monitoring. If it gets worse, we notify you. No cost, no commitment.
action.card2_desc: You may qualify for Pronaf, Garantía-Safra, or subsidized rural insurance.
action.card3_desc: R$ 40/month → Receive R$ 4,000 automatically if the situation gets worse.
action.card3_alert: 23 farmers in Unaí are already participating

confirm.title: Interest registered!
confirm.subtitle: Simulation request sent
confirm.next_step1: The {coop} team will analyze the submitted documentation
confirm.next_step2: They will contact you to validate your property boundaries
confirm.next_step3: Parametric satellite protection by SafraSense will be activated

comprovar.title: Verify property ownership
comprovar.desc: The CAR number and boundary polygon are public. To activate protection in your name, we need to confirm you are the owner. Therefore, we request the CAR receipt, a document only the owner or possessor has.
comprovar.help_link: Don't have the receipt? You can issue it for free at car.gov.br with your CAR number.

programs_custom.car_step_desc: Send the CAR (Rural Environmental Registry) receipt for this property. Only the owner has this document, necessary to activate any protection in your name.

protection_custom.title: Parametric insurance via partner
protection_custom.subtitle: SafraSense brokers access. Coverage is operated by an insurer authorized by SUSEP.
protection_custom.newe_desc: Brazilian insurtech pioneer in parametric insurance, focusing on family farming and distribution through cooperatives.
protection_custom.newe_feat_cov: Coverage: water deficit (drought) by satellite trigger
protection_custom.newe_feat_pay: Payout: automatic, without inspection, when the index is triggered
protection_custom.newe_footer: We are evaluating a partnership with Newe. Commercial conditions (premium, coverage, amount) will be defined in the agreement.
protection_custom.mapfre_desc: Insurer with a strong presence throughout Latin America and a line dedicated to rural and agricultural insurance.
protection_custom.mapfre_feat_cov: Coverage: agricultural climate risks (multirisk and parametric)
protection_custom.mapfre_feat_scope: Scope: operation in multiple LAC countries
protection_custom.mapfre_feat_cap: Capacity: support to scale beyond Brazil
protection_custom.mapfre_footer: We are evaluating a partnership with Mapfre. Commercial conditions will be defined in the agreement.
protection_custom.example_disclaimer: Illustrative example: automatic payment via Pix for water deficit. Values defined by the insurer according to area and crop.
protection_custom.more_allies: More partners are under evaluation. We will notify you when new options become available.
protection_custom.verification_warning: To activate parametric insurance, we need to prove this property is yours.
